Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IQuest

  • public interface IQuest
    Represents a quest with objectives, rewards, repeatability, and party/profile options.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IQuestCategory getCategory()  
      String getCompleteText()  
      long getCustomCooldown()  
      int getId()  
      boolean getIsRepeatable()  
      String getLogText()  
      String getName()  
      IQuest getNextQuest()  
      String getNpcName()  
      IQuestObjective[] getObjectives​(IPlayer player)
      Returns the quest objectives for the given player.
      IPartyOptions getPartyOptions()  
      IProfileOptions getProfileOptions()  
      IQuestInterface getQuestInterface()  
      int getRepeatType()  
      IContainer getRewards()  
      long getTimeUntilRepeat​(IPlayer player)
      Returns the time remaining before the quest can be repeated.
      int getType()  
      void save()
      Saves this quest to disk.
      void setCompleteText​(String text)  
      void setCustomCooldown​(long newCooldown)  
      void setLogText​(String text)  
      void setName​(String name)  
      void setNextQuest​(IQuest quest)  
      void setNpcName​(String name)  
      void setRepeatType​(int type)
      Sets the repeat type.
      void setType​(int type)  

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns:
        the unique quest ID.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        the quest display name.

      • setName

        void setName​(String name)
        Parameters:
        name - the quest display name.

      • getType

        int getType()
        Returns:
        the quest type ordinal (0: Item, 1: Dialog, 2: Kill, 3: Location, 4: AreaKill, 5: Manual).

      • setType

        void setType​(int type)
        Parameters:
        type - the quest type ordinal.

      • getLogText

        String getLogText()
        Returns:
        the quest log description text.

      • setLogText

        void setLogText​(String text)
        Parameters:
        text - the quest log description text.

      • getCompleteText

        String getCompleteText()
        Returns:
        the text displayed on quest completion.

      • setCompleteText

        void setCompleteText​(String text)
        Parameters:
        text - the completion text.

      • getNextQuest

        IQuest getNextQuest()
        Returns:
        the next quest in the chain, or null if none.

      • setNextQuest

        void setNextQuest​(IQuest quest)
        Parameters:
        quest - the next quest in the chain, or null to clear.

      • getObjectives

        IQuestObjective[] getObjectives​(IPlayer player)
        Returns the quest objectives for the given player.
        Parameters:
        player - the player whose objectives to retrieve.
        Returns:
        an array of quest objectives.

      • getCategory

        IQuestCategory getCategory()
        Returns:
        the category this quest belongs to.

      • getRewards

        IContainer getRewards()
        Returns:
        the reward container with items given on completion.

      • getNpcName

        String getNpcName()
        Returns:
        the NPC name associated with this quest.

      • setNpcName

        void setNpcName​(String name)
        Parameters:
        name - the NPC name.

      • save

        void save()
        Saves this quest to disk.

      • getIsRepeatable

        boolean getIsRepeatable()
        Returns:
        true if this quest can be repeated.

      • getTimeUntilRepeat

        long getTimeUntilRepeat​(IPlayer player)
        Returns the time remaining before the quest can be repeated.
        Parameters:
        player - the player.
        Returns:
        milliseconds until repeatable, or 0 if ready.

      • setRepeatType

        void setRepeatType​(int type)
        Sets the repeat type.
        Parameters:
        type - 0: None, 1: Instant, 2: Daily, 3: Weekly, 4: Custom.

      • getRepeatType

        int getRepeatType()
        Returns:
        the repeat type ordinal.

      • getQuestInterface

        IQuestInterface getQuestInterface()
        Returns:
        the quest interface (type-specific objective data).

      • getPartyOptions

        IPartyOptions getPartyOptions()
        Returns:
        the party options for this quest.

      • getProfileOptions

        IProfileOptions getProfileOptions()
        Returns:
        the profile options for this quest.

      • getCustomCooldown

        long getCustomCooldown()
        Returns:
        the custom cooldown in milliseconds for the Custom repeat type.

      • setCustomCooldown

        void setCustomCooldown​(long newCooldown)
        Parameters:
        newCooldown - the custom cooldown in milliseconds.
